TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tayilung == u siwkay nu nipaluma pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u cudad a ngangan: pedilanthus tithymaloides poit. u sapamat a ngangan: euphorbiaceae u Amilika a ngangan: slipper flower, redbird cactus. redbird flower, Japenese poinsettia u zuma a cidekay a kamu Pangcha: x Tayan: x Sejek: x Paywan: x Taluku: x Yuwatan: madain masanglav tu ismud Rukay: x Cou: cuun tavincangai Kabalan: x Kanakanabu: x Laaluwa: x Saysia: x Puyuma: x Saw: x Tau: x u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam Ś§ßťäÄťĺć dayinglong u sulit nu Lipun u sulit nu Amilika saungay misapayu' a cidekay Yuwatan, Sakizaya, Cou, Rukay, Paywan
S.PHON: == tajir~…ĺuŇč == u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u ¶udad a ŇčaŇčan: p…ôdir~…ĺantńßus titńßjmar~…ĺoid…ôs poit. u sapamat a ŇčaŇčan: …ôupńßorbia ¶…ôa…ô u amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan: sr~…ĺipp…ôr fr~…ĺow…ôr, r…ôdbird ¶a ¶tus. r…ôdbird fr~…ĺow…ôr, *ap…ôn…ôs…ô poins…ôttia u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu paŇč ¶ńßa: * tajan: * s…ôj…ôk: * pajwan: * tar~…ĺuku: * juwatan: madain masaŇčr~…ĺa* tu ismud *ukaj: * ¶ou: ¶uun ta*in ¶aŇčai kabar~…ĺan: * kanakanabu: * r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa: * sajsia: * pujuma: * saw: * tau: * u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** dajiŇčr~…ĺoŇč u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj juwatan, sakizaja, ¶ou, *ukaj, pajwan
S.FORM: == tayilung == u siwkay nu nipaluma pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u cudad a ngangan: pedilanthus tithymaloides poit. u sapamat a ngangan: euphorbiaceae u Amilika a ngangan: slipper flower, redbird cactus. redbird flower, Japenese poinsettia u zuma a cidekay a kamu Pangcha: x Tayan: x Sejek: x Paywan: x Taluku: x Yuwatan: madain masanglav tu ismud Rukay: x Cou: cuun tavincangai Kabalan: x Kanakanabu: x Laaluwa: x Saysia: x Puyuma: x Saw: x Tau: x u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam Ś§ßťäÄťĺć dayinglong u sulit nu Lipun u sulit nu Amilika saungay misapayu' a cidekay Yuwatan, Sakizaya, Cou, Rukay, Paywan
S.PHON: == tajir~…ĺuŇč == u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u ¶udad a ŇčaŇčan: p…ôdir~…ĺantńßus titńßjmar~…ĺoid…ôs poit. u sapamat a ŇčaŇčan: …ôupńßorbia ¶…ôa…ô u amir~…ĺika a ŇčaŇčan: sr~…ĺipp…ôr fr~…ĺow…ôr, r…ôdbird ¶a ¶tus. r…ôdbird fr~…ĺow…ôr, *ap…ôn…ôs…ô poins…ôttia u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu paŇč ¶ńßa: * tajan: * s…ôj…ôk: * pajwan: * tar~…ĺuku: * juwatan: madain masaŇčr~…ĺa* tu ismud *ukaj: * ¶ou: ¶uun ta*in ¶aŇčai kabar~…ĺan: * kanakanabu: * r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa: * sajsia: * pujuma: * saw: * tau: * u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** dajiŇčr~…ĺoŇč u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj juwatan, sakizaja, ¶ou, *ukaj, pajwan
